title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Managing Oily Hair and Hormonal Imbalances
description: Lavandula angustifolia essential oils is a natural remedy that can help with oily hair. The oil contains properties like antiseptic, antifungal, and antiviral compounds that help balance the scalp's natural oil production. It's rich in constituents like linalool, linalyl acetate, and camphor, which have a calming effect on the scalp and reduce inflammation. When applied to oily hair, the oil helps to regulate the production of sebum, the natural oil produced by the scalp. This leads to...
